HGSS.534.0003: What do you think you’re doing?\f
HGSS.534.0004:
It’s dangerous to go out without
a Pokémon!\f
Wild Pokémon jump out of the grass
on the way to the next town.
HGSS.534.0005:
Oh! Your Pokémon is adorable!
I wish I had one!
HGSS.534.0006:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Leaving again?\f
You should tell your mom if you
are leaving.
HGSS.534.0007:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Leaving again?\f
You should tell your mom if you
are leaving.
HGSS.534.0008:
Call your mom on your Pokégear to
let her know how you’re doing.
HGSS.534.0011:
Did you leave your Pokégear at home?\f
You should ask your mom.
HGSS.534.0012:
Yo, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I hear Professor Elm discovered some
new Pokémon.
HGSS.534.0013:
...\f
So this is the famous Elm Pokémon Lab...\f
HGSS.534.0015:
Lyra: [0103,0000,0000]!\f
So you picked...
[0100,0001,0000]!\f
That’s a cute Pokémon you have!\f
When you walk with it, it’ll become
more friendly.\f
You should turn around and talk to it
sometimes, too.\f
Oh, that’s right!
Why don’t you show it to your mom?\r
See ya!\f
HGSS.534.0016:

[0100,0001,0000]!\f

HGSS.534.0018:
I almost completely forgot
about this...\r
Here, I’ll give you my number.\f
HGSS.534.0019:
[0103,0000,0000] registered Professor Elm
in the Pokégear!
HGSS.534.0020:
Professor Elm: I’ll call you if
anything comes up.\f
HGSS.534.0022:
Professor Elm has been waiting for you.\r
He said he has something to give you.\f
HGSS.534.0023:
Did you not hear me saying that
Professor Elm is waiting for you?\f
HGSS.534.0025:
Lyra: I wonder what a Kimono Girl
wants from you...

wants from you...
